name: SG Ceresco
message: Ceresco specializes in the production and provision of genetically pure soybean seeds for Canadian farmers, offering both conventional and organic options. The company acts as an intermediary between soybean producers and food processors, ensuring high-qualityservice and personalized solutions.We are ready to upload 38gb of corporate documents. Human resources, customer information, project information, internal confidential files, detailed financials, NDA, etc.
